description: Long-term and multimodal memory for AI agents - character-aware, mem0-compatible, fully-local option
name: io.github.TeleAI-UAGI/telemem

environmentVariables.description: API key for the default OpenAI LLM/embedder (not needed with a local TELEMEM_CONFIG)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Path to a TeleMem YAML/JSON config, e.g. the fully-local Ollama + FAISS setup (config/config.ollama.yaml)
environmentVariables.name: TELEMEM_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Default memory scope when tool calls omit user_id/agent_id/run_id (default: telemem-mcp)
environmentVariables.name: TELEMEM_DEFAULT_USER_ID
